title_en: 224. They do not have the entire hadith but it is the hadith ofWaabisah. (cont.)
title_id: Hadis #27: Kebaikan adalah Akhlak yang Baik (lanjutan)
content_en: It is more concerned with could be called "a judgment call," where one has to decide what ruling applies in the particular case that he is facing. He may have contradictory signs showing that something could be permissible or impermissible. It is in those types of cases that he consults his heart and follows the ilhaam that he receives there. 2 Al-Haitami concludes that this hadith is not in reference to the disputed ilhaam. He says that ilhaam is a feeling that is put into the heart without any surrounding evidence or research into the matter under consideration. Here, the issue is of a different nature. Here, it is because of the appearance of some signs or evidences, perhaps very obscure, that a person has some doubt about a particular act. In that case, he turns to his heart. If it is uneasy about the act, he knows that he should not perform the act even if the people are claiming that there is no harm in it.3 "This is a hasan hadith. We have transmitted it in the two Musnads of the two Imams Ahmad ibn Hanbal and al-Daarimi with a good ( hasan ) chain." Hasan hadith with a hasan chain Al-Nawawi explicitly mentioned that both the hadith and its chain are hasan.4 This may sound redundant but it is not. A hadith could be hasan while its chain is not and vice-versa. A hadith may be called hasan while it is from the category of hasan lighairihi or hasan not on its own merit alone, but only due to supporting evidence. So one hadith could have a weak chain but since it is supported by other reports, the hadith itself is not weak but it is hasan. 1 Quoted in Uthmaan ibn Ali ibn Hasan, Minhaj al-lstidlaal ala Masaail al-ltiqaad (Riyadh: Maktaba al-Rushd, 1 992), vol. 2, p. 665. 2 For more on the refutation of using ilhaam in more than the restricted sense described above, see Saadiq, pp. 434-440; ibn Hasan, vol. 2, pp. 665-667. 3 Al-Haitami, Fath, p. 216. 4 As was noted in the Takhreej section, his statement that the chain is hasan seems to be incorrect. Hadith #27: "Righteousness is Good Character .. " On the other hand, the statement, "The chain is hasan," implies that all of the narrators of the hadith are of at least hasan quality, while some, not all, might even be of sahih quality. Furthermore, the chain must be unbroken. That is enough to say that the chain is hasan but that is not sufficient to say that the hadith itself is hasan. The hadith might have some defect to it or it may contradict stronger authorities. In that case, although the chain is hasan, the hadith itself would be rejected. In addition, a particular chain could be of hasan level but the hadith itself may be sahih if it is narrated through other channels. The TwoMusnads A Musnad is a type of hadith collection that is not arranged according to fiqh topic, as is the case with Sahih al-Bukhari', Sahih Muslim and other books available in English. Instead, a Musnad collection is arranged according to the Companion on whose authority the hadith is narrated. There are many such collections of hadith. Perhaps the most famous is the Musnad of Ahmad. Other Musnad collections include the Musnad of Abd ibn Humaid, Musnad of Abu Yala, Musnad of al-Bazzaar, Musnad of al­ Humaidi and Musnad of Abu Dawood al-Tayaalisi. The reader may have noted that no mention was made of the Musnad of al-Daarimi, whom al-Nawawi has referred to. This is because al-Daarimi does not have a collection of the Musnad variety. Instead, his was a work known as Sunan al-Daarimi. Sunan works, like the Sunan Abu Dawood available in English, are arranged according to fiqh topic. Why then did al-Nawawi refer to it as a Musnad? As al-Iraaqi explained, al-Daarimi's work is sometimes referred to as a Musnad. However, that is not in the sense described above. The word musnad also has another meaning among the scholars of hadith. It refers to hadith with chains that are unbroken and which are traced all the way back to the Prophet (peace be upon him). In general, this is the type of hadith that one finds in Sunan al-Daarimi. That is why it is sometimes referred to as Musnad al-Daarimi. But as to the type of hadith collection, it is not a Musnad work.2 It seems that it would have been clearer for al-Nawawi not to refer to both Ahmad's work and al-Daarimi's work as the two Musnads, since they are not actually two of the same type of Musnad. Allah knows best. 1 The reader may have noted that the word musnad also appeared in the title of al-Bukhari's work. However, in that case it is used with a different meaning: musnad also means a hadith with a complete chain that is traced all the way back to the Prophet (peace be upon him).
content_id:
Hal ini lebih berkaitan dengan apa yang bisa disebut 'keputusan penilaian,' di mana seseorang harus memutuskan hukum apa yang berlaku dalam kasus tertentu yang beliau hadapi. Beliau mungkin memiliki tanda-tanda yang bertentangan yang menunjukkan bahwa sesuatu bisa jadi halal atau haram. Dalam jenis kasus itulah beliau berkonsultasi dengan hatinya dan mengikuti ilham yang beliau terima di sana.

Al-Haitami menyimpulkan bahwa hadis ini tidak mengacu pada ilham yang diperdebatkan. Beliau mengatakan bahwa ilham adalah perasaan yang dimasukkan ke dalam hati tanpa bukti atau penelitian apa pun di sekitarnya tentang masalah yang sedang dipertimbangkan. Di sini, masalahnya bersifat berbeda. Di sini, karena munculnya beberapa tanda atau bukti, mungkin sangat samar, sehingga seseorang memiliki keraguan tentang suatu tindakan tertentu. Dalam kasus itu, beliau berpaling ke hatinya. Jika hatinya tidak nyaman dengan tindakan tersebut, beliau tahu bahwa beliau tidak boleh melakukan tindakan tersebut meskipun orang-orang mengklaim tidak ada salahnya.

'Ini adalah hadis hasan. Kami telah meriwayatkannya dalam dua Musnad dua Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal dan Al-Darimi dengan sanad yang baik (hasan).' Al-Nawawi secara eksplisit menyebutkan bahwa baik hadis maupun sanadnya adalah hasan. Ini mungkin terdengar redundan tetapi tidak demikian. Suatu hadis bisa jadi hasan sementara sanadnya tidak, dan sebaliknya. Suatu hadis mungkin disebut hasan sementara itu dari kategori hasan lighairihi atau hasan bukan berdasarkan manfaatnya sendiri saja, tetapi hanya karena bukti pendukung. Jadi satu hadis bisa memiliki sanad yang lemah tetapi karena didukung oleh laporan-laporan lain, hadis itu sendiri tidak lemah melainkan hasan.

Di sisi lain, pernyataan 'Sanadnya hasan' menyiratkan bahwa semua perawi hadis setidaknya berkualitas hasan, sementara beberapa, bukan semua, bahkan mungkin berkualitas sahih. Selain itu, sanad harus tidak terputus. Itu sudah cukup untuk mengatakan bahwa sanadnya hasan tetapi tidak cukup untuk mengatakan bahwa hadis itu sendiri hasan. Hadis tersebut mungkin memiliki cacat tertentu atau mungkin bertentangan dengan otoritas yang lebih kuat. Dalam kasus itu, meskipun sanadnya hasan, hadis itu sendiri akan ditolak. Selain itu, suatu sanad tertentu mungkin berada pada level hasan tetapi hadis itu sendiri mungkin sahih jika diriwayatkan melalui jalur-jalur lain.

Dua Musnad: Musnad adalah jenis koleksi hadis yang tidak disusun menurut topik fikih, sebagaimana halnya Sahih Al-Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, dan buku-buku lain. Sebaliknya, koleksi Musnad disusun menurut Sahabat yang atas wewenangnya hadis tersebut diriwayatkan. Ada banyak koleksi hadis semacam itu. Mungkin yang paling terkenal adalah Musnad Ahmad. Koleksi Musnad lainnya termasuk Musnad Abd ibn Humaid, Musnad Abu Ya'la, Musnad Al-Bazzar, Musnad Al-Humaidi, dan Musnad Abu Dawud At-Tayalisi.

Pembaca mungkin memperhatikan bahwa tidak ada penyebutan Musnad Al-Darimi, yang Al-Nawawi rujuk. Ini karena Al-Darimi tidak memiliki koleksi jenis Musnad. Sebaliknya, karyanya dikenal sebagai Sunan Ad-Darimi. Karya-karya Sunan, seperti Sunan Abu Dawud, disusun menurut topik fikih. Mengapa Al-Nawawi menyebutnya sebagai Musnad? Sebagaimana Al-Iraqi jelaskan, karya Al-Darimi kadang-kadang disebut sebagai Musnad. Namun, itu bukan dalam pengertian yang dijelaskan di atas. Kata musnad juga memiliki makna lain di kalangan ulama hadis. Ini mengacu pada hadis dengan sanad yang tidak terputus dan yang ditelusuri kembali sampai ke Nabi ﷺ. Secara umum, inilah jenis hadis yang ditemukan dalam Sunan Ad-Darimi. Itulah mengapa kadang-kadang disebut sebagai Musnad Ad-Darimi. Tetapi mengenai jenis koleksi hadis, itu bukanlah karya Musnad. Wallahu a'lam.
